title: Journal
excerpt: All documented sessions, filterable by tag.

title: Product AI agent — from one-shot script to dashboard CDC
excerpt: We created the 36 Davis variants by hand, in a Python script. Rather than starting over for every new brand, we formalized the method: a conversational AI agent on the Cobra dashboard that reads any source file and creates or updates Odoo products with no technical step.
tags: agent odoo-dev strat doc en-cours cobra

title: Davis catalog → Odoo: price-list extraction + creation brief (Krypton & Ariane)
excerpt: Preparing the integration of a new speaker brand (Davis, Krypton + Ariane ranges) into Odoo 18: a clean extraction of the supplier price list into 11 models / 36 variants, and a Claude Code brief — read-only first, create only after a green light. Nothing created in the database yet — deliberately.

title: HF-OS: a Next.js 16 + Payload 3 foundation deployed, admin login via Google
excerpt: Bootstrapping then shipping the HF-OS technical foundation (Next.js 16 + Payload 3, Scaleway PostgreSQL, Render hosting), with admin login via Google SSO restricted to an allow-list. No business collections yet — just the deployed shell.

title: Re-linking a Shopify product to Odoo: a LINK/RELINK wizard in cobra_shopify
excerpt: Odoo↔Shopify links broke when a product was recreated with variants (orphaned history). After a script rescue (Focal Bathys MG), we made it a feature: a LINK/RELINK wizard in cobra_shopify — SKU matching, atomic swap, no script.

title: Odoo → Shopify: product archiving and re-listing finally in sync
excerpt: The connector reflected neither archiving nor re-listing of a product. 3 bugs fixed in cobra_shopify + a cleanup script (~590 stale records purged, 2 still-purchasable products made unavailable).

title: Claude context files for Cobra: update + CLAUDE-dev split
excerpt: The context files for the Cobra dev Claude project were outdated. Factual update from the repo, split of CLAUDE-dev (generic core vs Cobra extension) and a CLAUDE-* naming convention. PR #385 to preprod.

title: Do you still need to buy an ERP when AI lets you build your own?
excerpt: HF-OS dossier: a press ERP built from scratch in 5 days / 96 PRs with Claude Code, plus Odoo extended at Cobra. CRM, ad sales, invoicing, dunning, and the real build-vs-buy question.

title: What is Claude, and why did I build everything on it?
excerpt: Claude, Anthropic's AI assistant, explained simply: who makes it, why it's in the top tier, and why I made it the foundation of all my projects (for real, not just a demo).

title: A site + an AI bot in a weekend?
excerpt: Yes: without knowing how to code, a complete static site and a serverless AI monitoring bot shipped in one weekend with Claude Code. Method, minimal stack, guardrails.

title: Case study — Knowledge Hub: from idea to production
excerpt: Build in public: shipping and running a complete site (70+ pages, dark mode, GEO layer) in vanilla HTML/CSS/JS on GitHub Pages, with Claude Code. Decisions, struggles, real time, zero token cost.

title: Case study — An AI agent that processes supplier invoices in Odoo
excerpt: An autonomous agent that reads email (Microsoft Graph), extracts invoices (OCR + Claude API), links them to the Odoo purchase order (guaranteed 3-way match, price check) and pushes them for approval in Teams. Hosted on a Scaleway instance, 15-min cron. Human drift quantified (~€2M off-chain) and a workflow that can no longer drift.
tags: build-in-public agent-ia odoo api-claude scaleway teams guide

title: Case study — AI monitoring bot: from idea to production
excerpt: A serverless agent: X/Twitter + RSS → Claude API → Telegram + feed.json on the site, orchestrated by GitHub Actions. 2-repo architecture, cross-repo bridge, CI struggles, real cost ~a few cents/day.

title: Making-of — shipped in a weekend
excerpt: From dinner with friends to a "beautiful thing shipped in 2 days": this site and an AI monitoring bot delivered in a weekend, side by side with Claude Code, without being a developer.

title: What is AI, and what's an "LLM"?
excerpt: Generative AI and LLMs explained without jargon: what they do, who the big players are (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Mistral…), and above all what they can NOT do.

title: Chat, Cowork, or Code: which one to use (and the famous "terminal")
excerpt: Three ways to use Claude depending on the task — and the truth about the "terminal", which looks scary but installs in one command you just copy-paste.

title: Why AI is genuinely changing the way we work
excerpt: Not another trend. Why generative AI is a shift of the same order as electricity, what it concretely changes for a business owner or merchant, and what it doesn't change.

title: What is GitHub, and why is it free and magical
excerpt: GitHub for non-devs: the vault that saves your work, keeps the full history, and once connected, updates itself. Free to get started.

title: What's an "MCP", and how to connect Claude to your tools
excerpt: Copy-paste, browser, API, MCP: the four ways to connect Claude to your tools (Shopify, Gmail, Drive…), from simplest to most powerful.

title: What's an "AI agent"?
excerpt: An AI agent is Claude given a goal and the means to act on its own, in a loop, until it delivers. What it makes possible — and the essential guardrail.

title: Fable, Mythos, Glasswing: why Anthropic released two versions of the same model
excerpt: On June 9, 2026, Anthropic launched Claude Fable 5 — the first model in a "Mythos" class above Opus — and restricted the unguarded version, Mythos 5, to vetted cyberdefenders through Project Glasswing.
tags: fable mythos anthropic claude news guide

title: What is a "loop"? Recurring agent tasks
excerpt: An agent re-running the same task at a regular interval: monitor, check, alert — without you. Claude Code's /loop, how it differs from a scheduled task, and the guardrails.

title: Writing a good CLAUDE.md (the most valuable file you'll ever make)
excerpt: The file that tells Claude how to work with you — tone, conventions, pitfalls to avoid. How to write it, and how to make it grow.

title: The 4 principles I apply with AI (Karpathy style)
excerpt: Who Andrej Karpathy is, and the 4 principles I've drawn from him to make AI save me time: think before you act, keep it simple, stay surgical, drive by objective.

title: Compound Engineering: your method improves itself
excerpt: The principle that makes your AI usage improve on its own: every lesson is captured and reused, and your system starts each session from a higher baseline.

title: AI in practice, for a merchant or an SME
excerpt: What a merchant or SME can realistically do with AI today, without a tech team. The use cases that pay off, seen from my own shop floor.

title: Is my data safe with AI?
excerpt: Where your data goes when you use AI, who can see it, whether it's used to train models — and the simple reflexes (plan, settings, sovereignty) to stay in control.

title: How to talk to AI properly: writing a good prompt
excerpt: A good prompt is 80% of the result: the recipe (context, task, format, constraints), the reflexes that change everything, and why iterating beats a "magic phrase".

title: Being visible in AI: GEO explained
excerpt: The SEO of the AI era: being cited in responses from ChatGPT, Perplexity, or Claude. Why it's becoming vital, and the concrete steps to get there.

title: How much does AI cost: subscriptions, API, and keeping the bill under control
excerpt: Everything is counted in tokens. The ways to pay for AI (free, subscription, pay-per-use API, enterprise), which to choose, and how to keep costs under control.

title: Odoo automatic product creation agent
excerpt: Automating Odoo product creation via multi-source triangulation (POS Excel, email screenshot, price photo). First pattern on the Sony Bravia FY26 catalog.

title: The invoice agent goes to production: autonomous on Scaleway
excerpt: Cobra's supplier invoice processing agent now runs on its own on a Scaleway instance: it reads email every 15 min via Microsoft Graph, extracts each invoice (OCR + Claude API), links it to its Odoo purchase order (guaranteed 3-way match) and pushes it for approval in Teams. ~9-10 hrs/week saved — and a workflow that can no longer drift.

title: Autonomous supplier invoice processing agent
excerpt: Mapping out the full architecture of an invoice agent (5 channels, line-by-line matching, 4 sub-agents, Teams actions) before writing a single line of code. Only touch Odoo once a week.

title: Anatomy of HiFi Lovers × Yamaha Collector Issue N°1 cover
excerpt: Structuring the visual hierarchy of the first special issue's cover, inspired by the grammar of 80s-90s Marvel/Image comics (corner box, masthead, collector badge).

title: Haute Fidélité Shopify store audit & launch
excerpt: Auditing and finalizing the HF Shopify store before scaling up: MCP Shopify, GLS switchover, email authentication, 4 editorial templates, audit of 30+ products and 7 collections. (Merged from 3 sessions.)

title: Cobra inbox audit & filtering (Outlook)
excerpt: Getting back in control of the hlahutte@cobra.fr inbox drowned in noise (Odoo catchall, EDI, notifications): 30-day audit, server/client rules, urgent backlog.

title: Shopify/Odoo audit: 803 products, 3 months of work
excerpt: Cross-referencing the Shopify catalog (front) and Odoo (back): reference consistency, pricing, stock, metadata across 803 products. The B&W AM-1 pair vs unit case.

title: Cobra UI audit + odoo18_design_reference update
excerpt: Testing the theoretical Odoo 18 reference against the actual code in 9 cobra_* modules. 35 XML files read, 5 tech debts identified, ~60 custom fields inventoried.

title: Daily HiFi monitoring Telegram bot
excerpt: A Telegram push every morning with worldwide hi-fi news: ~35 multilingual RSS sources, content written by the Claude API, anti-duplicate memory, GitHub Actions cron — from scratch.

title: CDC-18: Cobra purchasing workflow (cobra_purchase)
excerpt: A complete purchasing module for Cobra: RFQ/PO dashboards, supplier response detection, warehouse filters. 6 Odoo 18 SaaS bugs turned into 7 reusable rules.

title: CDC-18 form view: surgical production deployment
excerpt: Pushing only the PO form to production (buttons, dynamic titles, statusbar) without dragging in CDC-19 — isolating a clean commit from a mixed preprod3 stack.

title: CDC-18 stabilisation: dashboard filters, menus, fr_FR translations
excerpt: Two leftover bugs in the purchasing dashboard: buttons not activating filters, and menus keeping their old French names. Layered diagnosis, immediate + lasting fix.

title: CDC-19: improved Purchase Order list view
excerpt: Drop/Restock badge, confirmed delivery date, time-free dates in the PO list. Two OWL 18 traps: position=attributes ignored, silent XML rollback.

title: Claude's arrival in the Cobra workflow
excerpt: Before Claude, Odoo dev was manual: OCA forums, docs, trial and error. The pivot — treating Claude as a senior colleague who amplifies, not replaces.

title: Colleagues getting on Claude
excerpt: Claude isn't staying a solo tool: colleagues at Cobra are starting to use it. Sharing context without credentials, a solid CLAUDE.md, avoiding reinventing the wheel.

title: Sendcloud × GLS config for Haute Fidélité Shopify
excerpt: Pooling HF e-commerce logistics with the Cobra infrastructure (Sendcloud + daily GLS pickup) while keeping a branded HF customer tracking experience. Live config session.

title: Contesting the Roadsurfer / Creditreform debt
excerpt: Contesting a €2,549 claim (disputed scratch on a rented van) all the way to the CEC France: multilingual FR/DE drafting, navigating debt collection interfaces, compiling evidence.

title: Adrien's sole trader business creation (carpentry) — INPI file
excerpt: Helping my 18-year-old nephew set up his carpentry micro-business: guides, 9-step INPI file, supporting PDF documents, choice of tax regime.

title: Cobra store sales rep speech & job description
excerpt: Turning a raw management speech into three executable deliverables (bullet points, prose, Word job description to sign) after a team restructuring.

title: Double Claude Code: Cobra vs HL
excerpt: Two Claude Code accounts: the Cobra one (Odoo/Shopify dev) and a new HL one (personal, strategy, Knowledge Hub). Both can write to the same journal.

title: Dynaudio Emit II sales analysis: Shopify + Odoo cross-referenced
excerpt: Cross-referencing Shopify (web channel, 104 orders) and Odoo (all channels, 186 units, +79%) for an accurate sales picture. The limits of Drive MCP on file editing.

title: Epson sales declaration: Odoo → Google Sheets export
excerpt: An Epson sales declaration across 7 promo periods and 10 projector references, despite supplier SKUs missing from Odoo. Mapping via supplierinfo, formatted Sheets export.

title: Fable 5 reviews the site: 4 bugs, RSS, and an AI watch finally visible to LLMs
excerpt: First full-scale test of Fable 5 the day after its release: complete site audit, 4 bugs fixed, the AI watch made visible to AI crawlers, RSS feeds, weekly consistency check. All shipped to production within the session.

title: GSC diagnosis + JOIN Stories JSON-LD fix + BigQuery setup
excerpt: 7 product pages throwing "product snippets" errors in GSC. Root cause: JOIN Stories injecting implicit Product entities. Non-invasive snippet fix + BigQuery setup.

title: Cobra.fr GTM overhaul: pruning 71 → 20 tags + Consent Mode v2
excerpt: 71 accumulated tags, outdated CMP, patched-together Consent Mode. Migration to native Shopify Consent Mode v2, down to 20 tags, ~70 orphaned variables removed.

title: Cobra SFTP infrastructure: phase 1 server setup
excerpt: Setting up a lasting SFTP infrastructure (Scaleway/Ubuntu) where each supplier drops their stock files, automatically picked up by Odoo. Step-by-step guided server setup.

title: Bilingual Knowledge Hub: English version + auto-translation
excerpt: Making the Knowledge Hub bilingual FR/EN: a /en/ mirror of 74 pages, hreflang, language switcher, bilingual search and glossary, and a GitHub Actions workflow that translates each new page via the Claude API.

title: This Knowledge Hub itself
excerpt: A static GitHub Pages site (HTML/CSS, zero framework): AI portfolio, operational journal, and GEO reference. One page per entry, llms.txt + JSON-LD authorship.

title: INPI trademark management — HIFI LOVERS
excerpt: Taking back control of the HIFI LOVERS trademark (already registered at the INPI without my knowing) and preparing a supplementary figurative filing + class 16 for print.

title: Claude Code mission brief: D&M France invoice verification
excerpt: 14 PDFs imported as draft invoices in Odoo, unreliable. A structured and secured brief (PO matching, WEEE, early payment discount, guardrails) for Claude Code to work autonomously.

title: HiFi Lovers special issue Yamaha giveaway for advertisers — Brevo × Shopify
excerpt: Offering the first HiFi Lovers special issue to advertisers via a clean mechanic: Excel list → Brevo → Shopify combo promo codes restricted to the segment AND the product.

title: Alexis English PowerPoint — "The Secrets of My Success"
excerpt: A narrated 10-slide PowerPoint + second-calibrated script for an English class project (Dual Diploma). Iterative workflow with slide-by-slide visual QA.

title: Brevet oral PPTX "Addictions Among Youth" (Damien)
excerpt: Turning a year-9 student's script into a brevet oral presentation: 9 "icy cyan" slides, sourced figures, integrated photos — without losing the kid's voice.

title: PO email routing Drop vs Restock + Cobra templates
excerpt: Routing PO confirmation emails to the right Cobra template depending on Drop (direct delivery) or Restock (warehouse), with _send_confirmation_mail override. In production.

title: Shopify collections SEO fix (Guillaume's audit)
excerpt: 11 systemic issues across ~175 collections after a mass optimization. 182 "| Cobra.fr" suffixes removed in 26 GraphQL batches, 0 errors. Post-compaction recovery.

title: Claude setup: documentation, onboarding and Knowledge Hub
excerpt: Documenting the Claude setup logic (md files, projects, two accounts) to hand off to a friend getting started and build on it session after session.

title: SFTP server + automated dropshipping stock pipeline
excerpt: SSH hardening (fail2ban, ufw, chroot) + script that injects any uploaded file into Odoo via the existing module. Hooking into action_run_import: ×60 speed gain.

title: Sogetronic profile: dropshipping stock import by supplier code
excerpt: Extending cobra_import_stock_drop to match Sogetronic on the Sage Code (not the EAN). Schema migration, anti-duplicate XML seed, cherry-pick preprod3 → main.

title: Sogetronic seed + Knowledge Hub Claude restructuring
excerpt: Two needs in one session: loading Sogetronic Sage Codes onto 175 product sheets, and restructuring Claude context files for dual chat + Code use.

title: Sony Bravia II price update + zero-margin diagnosis
excerpt: 19 Sony Bravia prices bulk-updated via XML-RPC, then a 0% margin diagnosis: the UI was showing sellers_first_price under "Cost", not the actual standard_price.

title: Delivered / Invoiced / Paid statuses on purchase orders
excerpt: 3 consolidated statuses (Delivered/Invoiced/Paid) shown as badges on the PO form and lists, to know the real state of an order at a glance. Multi-list xpath traps.

title: HiFi Lovers Instagram strategy — Brief for Marine
excerpt: Scoping an Instagram strategy from scratch for HiFi Lovers: 70/30 archive/editorial positioning, 4 pillars, calendar, 8-week launch plan, before handing it over to Marine.

title: Claude "Odoo" project structuring: ecosystem reference docs
excerpt: Consolidating all validated technical connections into a reference doc so every new conversation starts with the right context.

title: Claude custom instructions system (CLAUDE.md + extensions)
excerpt: Standardizing Claude's behavior across all my projects and both accounts: a universal CLAUDE.md + strategy and dev extensions. Triggered by an Odoo production incident hardcoded as a strict rule.

title: Supplier PO email template overhaul (FR + EN)
excerpt: Bringing the PO email template up to the standard of the "payment" template, bilingual, with fixed-text constraints. Formatting only, zero change to the actual content.
